titleStmt.title: SII 26.196: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 196. (A.R. No. 184 of 1909.) AVANĀSHI, AVANASHI TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: South wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the same shrine.

This inscription records a settlement concluded by the members of the VeḷḷAḷa community and the members of the PUluva community belonging to VaḍapariśAnakanāḍuRead Vaḍapariśāraka-nāḍu., with the members of the two communities belonging to ŚēvUr alias Śembiyaṉ-kiḻAnaḍinallUr in the same VaḍapariśAnaka-nāḍuRead Vaḍapariśāraka-nāḍu., a dēvadāna of the god Avināśiyāḷuḍaiyār but with the proprietory right over it resting with these people. The settlement related to the removal of two VeḷḷAla and two PUluva families from this village, without, however, stating the reason of this action. Several signatories, each hailing from a different village, figure in this record.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
kovirācakecaripaṟmarāṉa tribhuvaṉa
ccakkaravattikaḷ śrīvirapāṇṭiya tevaṟku
yāṇṭu 8 vatu māci mātam vaṭaparicānakanāṭṭu
veḷḷānāṭṭomum pūluvanāṭṭomum yi
ṉṉāṭṭil cevūrāṉa cempiyaṉkiḻānaṭina
llūr veḷḷāṉ Ūrum pūluvarum piṭipāṭu
kuṭutta paricāvatu Iṉṉāṭṭil Avināciyāḷuṭai
yār tevatāṉamāy Ivarkaḷ kāṇiyāṉa cempiya
ṉkiḻānaṭinallūr Eḻa
rai Eṇpaṭṭakkuṭi Irukkiṟa kuṭikaḷile veḷḷāṉ kuṭiyile
Iraṇṭu kuṭiyum pūluvakkuṭiyile Iraṇṭu kuṭiyu
m Āka nālukuṭi Eṭṭāvatiṉ Etirāmāṇṭu mutal nikki
kuṭuppomākavum nikkikkuṭutta kuṭinālukkum veḷākuṭi
Eḻukuṭiyenṟu collakkaṭavomallavākavum Ip
paṭikku makkaḷ makkaḷ cantirātittavarai celvatākavu
m Ippaṭi cempilu cilaiyilum koḷvā
rkaḷākavum Ippaṭikku cammatittu piṭipāṭu kuṭuttom vaṭa
paricānakanāṭṭuRead Vaḍapariśāraka-nāḍu.veḷḷānāṭṭomum pūluvanāṭṭomum In
nāṭṭu cevūrāṉa cempiyaṉkiḻānaṭinallūr veḷḷā
ḷā(ṟ)ṟkum pūluvar Ūrāṟkum Ippaṭikku Ottanūril Avi
nāci mutaliyāna coḻanārāyaṇak kāmiṇṭan Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikku Ottanūril mutaliyil cokan kaimāṭṭāmai
cayiñaimāṭṭeṟinteṉ cevaḷapūṇṭiyil pūluvannāyaṉ
Appan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku nampiperuril veḷḷā
ḻaṉ mukkaṉ Āṇṭāṉen Ippaṭikku viṇṇappaḷḷi
yān Apimāṉacoḻanallūril veḷḷāḻaṉ marutāka kā
miṇṭan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ilattūril veḷḷāḻaṉ ko
ṅkakopiḷḷan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku marutūr veḷḷāḻa
n kaiymāṭṭāmai cayikaimāṭeṟinten veḷḷātiveḷḷā
ḻannakkaṉ cellaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku kaiñcappaḷḷiyil veḷḷaḻa
n mutali pottikai māṭṭāmaiyum karuvalūril veḷḷāḻapaṭṭi
ṭāvai kaiyimmāṭṭāmai cayiñaimāṭṭeṟinten tuṟava
lūr veḷḷāḻaṉ cokkaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Erumai
yaṉ kūvalūr veḷḷāḻa nakkaṉ mapaṉ kaiymmāṭṭāmal
cayiñai māṭṭeṟinten tuṟavalūr veḷḷāḻan cokkaṉ
cokkaṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 26.196 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
